message:
fix(itertools): Fix type inference for list(chain/islice) and islice codegen

- Add deque type handling in list() type inference to return list(i64)
  instead of list(PyObject) for itertools results
- Fix genIslice to use emitIter for proper iterator handling (range, list)
- Add itertools module export to runtime.zig
- Add bytes type inference for memoryview/bytes/bytearray builtins
- Add bytes handling in pyToInt error message
